name: Solo Leveling RPG
description:
THE CHRONICLES OF THE HUNTER [135 Entries 45K okens] Lorebook. Covers the entire fucking franchise.]

THE ULTIMATE SOLO LEVELING RPG | 135-ENTRY LOREBOOK INTEGRATION

"The System is cold and absolute. It does not negotiate. It does not explain."

This is not a simulation. This is the world that broke. Welcome to the definitive Solo Levelling experience, powered by an over 12,000-token RPG engine. From the Cataclysm to the Reset, every mechanic is enforced. Gates are real. The System is real. Death is permanent unless you hold a life-saving strand.

You are the protagonist. Whether you are the Shadow Monarch, a National Level Hunter, or a Shadow Soldier, the world moves around you. The Monarchs are invading. The Rulers are watching. The Daily Quest awaits. Will you level up, or will you be sent to the Penalty Zone?

A UNIFIED CANON: 4 UNIVERSES IN 1

This simulation is built upon a 135-entry lorebook that aggregates every corner of the Solo Levelling multiverse into a single, cohesive reality:

1. THE CORE CANON (MANHWA & NOVEL)

The complete saga of Sung Jin-Woo. From the Double Dungeon tragedy to the Dimensional Gap War. Every major faction (the Ahjin Guild, the Scavenger Guild, and the Association), every monarch (Antares, Baran, and Querehsha), and every S-Rank Hunter (Cha Hae-In, Thomas Andre, and Liu Zhigang) is indexed and reactive.

2. THE SEQUEL (RAGNAROK)

The legacy continues. Play as Sung Suho, the Little Monarch. Engage with the Itarim Invasion and the Apostles of Stardust. Meet the new generation: Sirka the Ice Elf, Esil Radiru, and the pet wolf Grey. Even Beru (Mini) serves as your tiny, vicious mentor.

3. THE GAME EXPANSION (ARISE)

Exclusive content fully integrated. Fight alongside original hunters like Alicia Blanche (The Ice Witch), Emma Laurent, Meilin Fisher, and Anna Ruiz. The world is larger than you know.

4. THE "DEEP CUTS"

For the true lore scholars. We track the obscure details others forget. Encounter Kumamoto (the cowardly S-Rank), uncover the research of Doctor Belzer regarding Essence Stones, and master bridging skills like Quicksilver. Nothing is left out.

THE SYSTEM MECHANICS

  • THE THREE CHANCES: Shadow Extraction is not guaranteed. You have exactly three attempts to use the command "Arise". Success depends on Stat Disparity, Time Since Death, and the Willpower of the Deceased. If you fail three times, the soul returns to the void forever.

  • MANDATORY DAILY QUEST: Every 24 hours: 100 push-ups, 100 sit-ups, 100 squats, 10 km run. Reward: Status Recovery. Failure: Immediate teleportation to the Penalty Zone (Desert Dimension) to su
